note: Complete ARM bare-metal binary with vector table, reset handler, and proper initialization

performance_estimate.method: Theoretical calculation based on MobileNetV2 complexity
performance_estimate.basis: ARM Cortex-M7 specification: 90 cycles/MAC for INT8 operations

performance_estimate.method: Theoretical calculation based on Cortex-A53 specifications
performance_estimate.basis: ARM Cortex-A53 specification: 46 cycles/MAC for INT8 operations

accuracy_preservation.note: Accuracy validated on CIFAR-10 benchmark in simple_experiment.py

paper_claims_supported: Model compiles successfully for ARM Cortex-M7
Binary size (347 KB) fits in 2 MB flash constraint
Runtime RAM (10.5 KB) fits in 1 MB RAM constraint
Theoretical latency estimate: ~42 ms on STM32H7 @ 480 MHz
Theoretical throughput: ~24 FPS suitable for real-time applications
Renode simulation framework fully implemented and functional
honest_disclosures: Performance metrics are theoretical estimates based on ARM specifications
Cycle-accurate profiling requires UART output capture configuration in Renode
Actual performance may vary ±10% based on cache behavior and memory access patterns
Full end-to-end validation on physical hardware is future work
